description_long: This house features a striking modernist design with a stacked, cantilevered structure composed of two main rectangular volumes. The upper level includes a large balcony or terrace with glass railings, providing an open outdoor space. The exterior is predominantly white with extensive use of glass, especially on the upper floor, allowing for ample natural light. A single entry door and a few windows are visible on the lower level, while the upper level is characterized by floor-to-ceiling windows. A red car is parked adjacent to the house, suggesting a driveway or parking area. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with clean lines and a flat roof, emphasizing contemporary architectural trends.
description: A modern, minimalist house with stacked rectangular volumes, large glass windows, and a flat roof. Features a prominent upper-level terrace and a white exterior.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cantilevered upper floor, a small window, and the main entry door on the lower level.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry door, a vertical window, and the adjacent red car parked in front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cantilevered structure and the red car parked to the left.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the extensive glass facade of the upper floor and the flat roof design.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch, minimal overhang, and no decorative elements
